context: Discovering Repertoire class — barre: pliés, tendus, ronds de jambe, fondus, preparation for batterie, adage; centre: port de bras, centre practice, adage, allegro 2–3

corrections.text: Pliés: musicality is the main priority — use the full phrase
Tendus: musicality is the main priority — use the full phrase
Ronds de jambe: listen to the music, don't rush
Fondus: listen to the music, don't rush
Preparation for batterie: listen to the music, don't rush
Adage barre — développé devant: square shoulders and hips
Port de bras: projection — look beyond the arms and shoulders
Port de bras — fourth arms: shoulders straight, not tilted; same applies in développé écarté
Centre practice — fourth arms: shoulders straight, not tilted; same applies in développé écarté
Adage centre — développé devant: square shoulders and hips
Adage centre: projection — look beyond the arms and shoulders
Adage centre — à la seconde extension: active flexibility, not just passive stretch
Allegro 2 — jeté passé: compact and directional, doesn't travel
Allegro 3: projection — look beyond the arms and shoulders
